message:
wezterm: add WaitResult::Cancelled match arms in PaneWaiter test suite

The `WaitResult` enum gained a `Cancelled { .. }` variant (carried
from the upstream wa work); the existing `PaneWaiter` tests in
`crates/frankenterm-core/src/wezterm.rs` matched on
`Matched { .. }` / `TimedOut { .. }` only and would therefore fail to
compile once the new variant became reachable via the shared
match shape.

Add `WaitResult::Cancelled { .. } => panic!("unexpected cancellation")`
arms to every exhaustive match in the test module:

* The main match in the "expected at least two polls + Matched" path
  and its nested `return`-branch twin.
* The tail-hash matcher test ("unexpected match" counterpart) and
  its nested `return`-branch twin.
* The "expected at most three polls + unexpected match" timeout
  test.

All arms panic, asserting that these scenarios should never observe
a cancellation — the tests drive non-cancelled Cx's and their
intent is that only the existing `Matched` / `TimedOut` results are
valid. The new arms only exist to keep `match WaitResult { .. }`
exhaustive so rustc stops warning / erroring on the new variant.

No production-code changes; pure test-compile fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
